title: ESP32 Drone & Flight Control System
subtitle: A custom quadcopter platform for flight control experimentation.
description: Designed and developed a drone prototype using ESP32, sensors, and motor drivers to explore flight dynamics and stabilization.
longDescription: Built a quadcopter prototype using ESP32, MPU6050, motor drivers, and coreless motors. The project focused on flight control, sensor integration, motor synchronization, and stabilization concepts. Development included experimenting with PID control, IMU data processing, wireless configuration tools, and embedded systems programming.
highlights: Explored stabilization and flight control algorithms.

title: IoT-Based Motor Monitoring & Protection System
subtitle: Real-time motor health monitoring with automated protection logic.
description: Built an ESP32-based platform for monitoring motor performance and preventing unsafe operating conditions.
longDescription: Developed a motor monitoring system capable of measuring voltage, current, temperature, sound level, and RPM in real time. Sensor data was transmitted over Wi-Fi to a web dashboard for remote monitoring. Protection logic automatically reduced motor speed or shut down the system whenever operating parameters exceeded safe thresholds.
imageAlt: Motor monitoring dashboard and hardware system

title: ESP32 RC Car
subtitle: A wireless robotic vehicle controlled through ESP32.
description: Built a remote-controlled robotic vehicle to explore embedded systems and motor control.
longDescription: Designed and developed a Wi-Fi controlled RC car using ESP32 and motor drivers. The project involved wireless communication, motor control, power management, and embedded programming. It served as a practical introduction to robotics and real-time control systems.

title: MOSFET Bidirectional Motor Driver
subtitle: A custom H-Bridge motor driver built from discrete components.
description: Designed and tested a MOSFET-based circuit for bidirectional DC motor control.
longDescription: Created a custom H-Bridge motor driver using MOSFETs to understand power electronics and motor control at a lower level. The project involved circuit design, component selection, testing, troubleshooting, and performance evaluation under different operating conditions.
highlights: Gained practical experience in power electronics.

title: Tech o' Health - Electronic Health Record Platform
subtitle: A digital healthcare platform for unified medical records.
description: Designed a healthcare technology platform focused on secure and accessible medical record management.
longDescription: Tech o' Health is a digital health platform concept aimed at improving accessibility and management of patient health records. The project explored healthcare interoperability, patient-centric data ownership, medical record organization, and digital healthcare infrastructure.

title: PRITHVI - Geopolitical Intelligence Platform
subtitle: An interactive world map for tracking global events and strategic developments.
description: Developed a platform that visualizes international news and geopolitical developments through geographic context.
longDescription: PRITHVI is a geopolitical intelligence platform that allows users to explore countries on an interactive world map and access real-time information related to international affairs, trade activity, conflicts, energy markets, diplomatic developments, and economic events. The project focuses on transforming fragmented news into a geographically organized intelligence experience.
highlights: Built an interactive country-based intelligence interface.

title: PID Tuning Dashboard
subtitle: A web-based tool for real-time controller tuning and calibration.
description: Developed a custom interface for adjusting PID parameters during embedded systems development.
longDescription: Created a dedicated dashboard for configuring and optimizing PID control systems. Originally built to support drone flight controller development, the platform enables rapid parameter adjustment, testing, and system calibration through a browser-based interface.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
subtitle: A JSON-driven portfolio platform for showcasing engineering work.
description: Designed and developed a responsive portfolio website to document projects, research, and achievements.
longDescription: Built a modern portfolio platform using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and JSON-based content management. The website was designed to showcase engineering projects, research activities, achievements, and technical experiences while remaining easy to maintain and expand over time.
highlights: Designed for long-term scalability and maintenance.
